channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Toronto Runner Creates Intricate Strava Map of His Route
item.description: Learn how a Toronto runner uses Strava to create detailed maps of his runs, causing controversy on social media.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Supreme Court steps into fight over FCC's $8 billion subsidies for internet and phone services
item.description: The Supreme Court has stepped into a major legal fight over the $8 billion a year the federal government spends to subsidize phone and internet services in schools, libraries and rural areas, in a new test of federal regulatory power.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Apple and Google face UK investigation into mobile browser dominance
item.description: A British watchdog says Apple and Google aren't giving consumers a genuine choice of mobile web browsers.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Windows 11 will soon be available on Meta Quest 3 headsets
item.description: Meta Quest 3 and Quest 3S headset owners will soon gain access to the “full capabilities” of Windows 11 in mixed reality, Microsoft announced at its Ignite conference this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Risk & Compliance Exchange 2024: NIST’s Ron Ross on engineering protections into cyber-physical systems
item.description: The massive convergence of cyber and physical systems has prompted the need for a framework based on engineering principles, the NIST fellow says. The post Risk & Compliance Exchange 2024: NIST’s Ron Ross on engineering protections into cyber-physical systems first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: AI agents are unlike any technology ever
item.description: The agents are coming, and they represent a fundamental shift in the role artificial intelligence plays in businesses, governments, and our lives. The biggest news in agentic AI happened this month when we learned that OpenAI’s agent, Operator, is expected to launch in January.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Los CIO consideran que la gestión de costes puede acabar con el valor de la IA
item.description: Los CIO que sienten la presión de implementar proyectos de inteligencia artificial (IA) exitosos tienen una segunda preocupación: no tienen el presupuesto para llevarlo a cabo.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Thai court dismisses activist's suit against Israeli spyware producer over lack of evidence
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A Thai court on Thursday threw out a lawsuit brought by a pro-democracy activist which alleged spyware produced by an Israeli tech firm had been used to hack his phone.
item.dc:creator: JERRY HARMER and DAVID RISING, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: AI Factories: Revolutionizing Business with AI-Optimized Infrastructure and Services
item.description: Accelerating AI adoption through Dell Technologies' AI Factory with NVIDIA
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Harnessing AI: A NetApp perspective
item.description: We take pride in our heritage at NetApp. Our heritage is rooted in developing innovative solutions that address the challenges of storing, managing, and protecting data in a complex IT environment.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Backup Software vs. Backup as a Service (BaaS): The Key Differences
item.description: As data volumes increase exponentially, the threat of data loss from cyberattacks, human error, or system failure has never been greater — which is why, in 2025, fortifying a data protection strategy has never made more sense.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Red Hat RHEL Becomes Official Linux Distribution for Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL)
item.description: Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL) set to become official Linux distribution for Microsoft's Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL), simplifying hybrid cloud deployments.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: SONiC pioneer Aviz Networks raises $17M for AI network management push
item.description: Networking software provider Aviz Networks today announced a $17 million Series A funding round to accelerate its growth in open networking solutions and artificial intelligence capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Comcast to spin off cable networks that were once the entertainment giant's star performers
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Comcast is spinning off into a new company many of the cable television networks that were once at the entertainment giant's heart as consumers increasingly swap out their cable TV subscriptions for streaming platforms.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: US gathers allies to talk AI safety as Trump's vow to undo Biden's AI policy overshadows their work
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has vowed to repeal President Joe Biden's signature artificial intelligence policy when he returns to the White House for a second term. What that actually means for the future of AI technology remains to be seen.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Meta's Threads app launches custom feeds amid Bluesky surge
item.description: Meta's Instagram Threads began rolling out a new custom feed feature to give users the ability to build their feeds around the people and topics they are most interested in.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: You’ll soon be able to clone your voice to speak other languages ​​in Teams
item.description: In connection with this year’s Ignite conference, Microsoft has unveiled a new interpretation tool that will be added to Teams in the spring.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Chatbot's disturbing message
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Network connectivity: An urgent matter of national security
item.description: Building a network architecture and organizational structure that can respond dynamically to new challenges and technologies is critical. The post Network connectivity: An urgent matter of national security first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: GSA listening more to customers to improve IAE platforms
item.description: Memi Whitehead, the deputy assistant commissioner for GSA’s Integrated Award Environment, said new tools aim to improve its users’ experiences. The post GSA listening more to customers to improve IAE platforms first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Australia won't force social media users to share their personal details when child ban takes effect
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia's communications minister said Wednesday the government won't force social media users to hand over their personal information to tech companies, as children younger than 16 are set to be banned from the platforms.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Microsoft pitches AI 'agents' that can perform tasks on their own at Ignite 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella told customers at a conference in Chicago on Tuesday that the company is teaching a new set of artificial intelligence tools how to "act on our behalf across our work and life.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Forget driverless cars. One company wants autonomous helicopters to spray crops and fight fires
item.description: HENNIKER, N.H. (AP) — When Hector Xu was learning to fly a helicopter in college, he recalled having a few “nasty experiences” while trying to navigate at night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft and Atom Computing claim breakthrough in reliable quantum computing
item.description: Microsoft and Atom Computing have announced what they claim is a significant step forward in reliable quantum computing, unveiling a commercial quantum machine built with 24 entangled logical qubits.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft rebrands Azure AI Studio to Azure AI Foundry
item.description: Microsoft is packaging its Azure AI Studio and other updates into a new service — Azure AI Foundry in response to enterprises’ need to develop, run, and manage generative AI applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: German police break up an environmental activists' camp near Tesla plant outside Berlin
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — German police broke up a protest camp housing environmental activists in a forest near the Tesla electric car factory in Grünheide outside Berlin on Tuesday, citing violations of public safety and order.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How to transform your architecture review board
item.description: I recall my angst about my first visit to an architecture review board (ARB), where a team of enterprise architects reviewed plans for new systems and application architectures.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Company affiliated with Alex Jones seeks to disqualify The Onion's auction bid on Infowars
item.description: A company affiliated with conspiracy theorist Alex Jones asked a federal judge on Monday to disqualify a bid by the satirical news outlet The Onion to buy Jones' Infowars at a bankruptcy auction, alleging fraud and collusion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: T-Mobile hacked by Chinese cyber espionage in major attack on US telecoms
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about T-Mobile being hacked in broad cyberattack on global phone and internet companies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How a wrong Google search can compromise your data and bring law enforcement calling
item.description: Wrong Google searches can not only compromise your device and personal data. They can also bring law enforcement to your doorstep. Hackers are targeting Google searches.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
